name: Close Window
desc: Server forces the client to close an inventory window.

implementation.overview: S2E forces the client to close a container window. The client must respond with C0DPacketCloseWindow with the same window ID. If the module has cancelled C0D (CancelInventoryMove), this S2E forces the GUI closed regardless. No module directly targets S2E in the examined client sources.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S2EPacketCloseWindow)
modules.purpose: Server sends S2EPacketCloseWindow to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
